description: Tasks for the existing Canvas Notebook repository in the context of the Control Plane architecture. This repo remains untouched; tasks focus on ensuring compatibility.

tasks.title: Verify CLI Stability for Agent Invocation
tasks.description: Ensure all canvas-notebook CLI commands (update, restart, health, logs, status) are idempotent and return reliable exit codes. The Agent will invoke these via child_process.

tasks.title: Document Agent Interaction
tasks.description: Add a section to AGENTS.md explaining how the Control Plane (via the Agent) manages this service. Reference the full architecture plan.

tasks.title: Confirm Health Endpoint Availability
tasks.description: Enhanced GET /api/health to return consistent JSON with DB connectivity check. This is the primary health signal for the Agent.
